content.text:
- 🔧 ipfs-deploy now has a new home at @protocollabs, who has taken up maintainership 🏁🙌

https://github.com/ipfs-shipyard/ipfs-deploy

As @keykapp has hijacked all my attention, this couldn't have come at a better moment.

Thanks so much to @hacdias for picking it up and *sprinting* with it!
